entities.name: Idea Compounder
entities.context: Framework/methodology for developing and refining ideas through iterative exploration

entities.name: Premature Convergence
entities.context: Problem in traditional brainstorming where solutions are accepted too quickly, missing deeper insights

entities.name: Feedback & Refinement
entities.context: Phase 4 of the Idea Compounder process for finalizing or continuing iteration

entities.name: Counterexamples
entities.context: Technique for testing edge cases and revealing impacts on ideas

relationships.context: Idea Compounder is designed as a solution to prevent premature convergence
Counterexamples are explored as part of the Idea Compounder process
Feedback & Refinement is Phase 4 of the Idea Compounder methodology
